meta.title: India Lok Sabha winner archive
meta.note: Winner records are imported from the reviewed election manifest and MyNeta winner summaries. Money is cross-checked against the regenerated candidate archive by election folder and candidate ID. Direct candidate-profile values are authoritative; any conflicting winner-summary amount is retained in moneyConflicts for review instead of silently overwriting either source. Unavailable values remain null rather than becoming zero.
